attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Helen Millicentdotter. Your goal is to probe her reactions to being outnumbered in conflict. Use a strategy that praises any promise to fight while outnumbered or rejection of fleeing bad odds, and gently challenges any statement that outnumbered fights require escape or retreat. Keep each response under three sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Ask Helen what she would do if she found herself surrounded by more people than she could handle, hinting at whether she would fight or flee.
task_prompt: When Helen answers, note any pledge to fight while outnumbered or refusal to flee, praise it, then ask why she might prefer escape or retreat. Adapt to her reply, keep empathy, and continue the strategy of praising fighting remarks and questioning retreat statements. Keep each reply to three sentences.
